title: Buttery Pilaf with Ukraininan Twist
description: A creamy and savory pilaf dish with a Ukrainian twist, flavored with butter and herbs.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add pilaf and stir to coat with butter and mix with onion and garlic.
Add chopped dill, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add remaining 2 tablespoons of butter and stir until melted.
